<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band08_chunk006.pdf#page=15 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band08 p278 -->

<!-- header: WALKERSAICH -->

<!-- header: WALKERSAICH -->


[[File:Band08_chunk006_p015_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p015_img002.jpg|thumb|1 Hl. Florian]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p015_img003.jpg|thumb|8 Hl. Georg]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p015_img004.jpg|thumb|6 Hl. Ruper]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p015_img005.jpg|thumb|s Hl Benedikt]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p015_img006.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band08 p279 -->
